title: nephrodium glaberrimum
intro: Nephrodium glaberrimum is a species of fern, specifically a type of lycopodiopsid fern, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium glaberrimum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal use, although its availability and usage may vary.
